usage: add_pg_cover_cell [-help] -cell <string> -inst_prefix <string> [{-location {x y} | -area {x1 y1 x2 y2}}] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2} [-exclude_macro_placement_area ]]

options.name: -area
options.description: specifies the area that PG cover instance will be added

options.name: -cell
options.description: specifies the PG cover cell name

options.name: -exclude_macro_placement_area
options.description: specifies PG cover instances will be placed in the specified area excluding the area where macros are placed. Only use with -area specified

options.name: -inst_prefix
options.description: specifies the PG cover cell instance prefix name that will be added. Names are of the form prefix_<int>

options.name: -location
options.description: specifies the location where only one PG cover instance will be added
